title: fix: add NSFW safety instructions to opposite-prompt bot
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Wholesome mode engaged
gist.blurb: The opposite-prompt bot just got a little more family-friendly. It now politely catches NSFW inputs and swaps them out for wholesome alternatives.
gist.summary: Added strict safety instructions to the opposite-prompt bot's system prompt to filter out inappropriate content.
gist.impact: Users trying to generate NSFW content with the bot will now receive wholesome, safe-for-work alternatives instead.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly moderator. She can be holding a 'WHOLESOME' sign or wearing a tiny crossing-guard vest, standing next to the Monitor Robot who is happily displaying a safe, beautiful flower on its screen instead of something naughty.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny crossing-guard vest, holding up a small sign that says 'WHOLESOME' in pixel font. Next to her, a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily displays a beautiful blooming daisy on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny crossing-guard vest, holding up a small sign that says 'WHOLESOME' in pixel font. Next to her, a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily displays a beautiful blooming daisy on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
